steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The passage states the traditions created “a hybrid dance form that spread across Mexico and later to Mexican communities in the US.” Hybrid means two different elements blended into one unified whole.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to express how two dance traditions came together to create a hybrid form. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘deferred to’: "Chichimeca Jonaz traditions deferred to those of other tribes" — deferred to means yielded or submitted to another's authority; one tradition subordinating itself would not create a hybrid. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘intermingled with’: "Chichimeca Jonaz traditions intermingled with those of other tribes" — intermingled with means mixed together, directly explaining how two distinct traditions merged into one hybrid dance form. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘corresponded to’: "Chichimeca Jonaz traditions corresponded to those of other tribes" — corresponded to means matched or aligned with, implying similarity rather than active blending. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘advocated for’: "Chichimeca Jonaz traditions advocated for those of other tribes" — advocated for means supported or argued in favor of, not merged with. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
